hooks.command: cat "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/decisions/README.md" | jq -Rs '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"SessionStart",additionalContext:("Project decision records (decisions/README.md), loaded on session start. Read the full ADR file before changing any rule it pins:\n\n" + .)}}'

cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command'); if printf '%s' "$cmd" | grep -q 'pre-commit-ok'; then exit 0; fi; jq -n '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PreToolUse",permissionDecision:"deny",permissionDecisionReason:"Pre-commit quality gate (.claude/skills/pre-commit) required before committing. Run it now: (1) change-review on the change — fix any bug/issue; (2) clean-code-review — fix every clean-code TODO marker scored > 0.5; (3) lint, typecheck, tests; (4) repeat until clean. Then re-issue this commit with the comment \" # pre-commit-ok\" appended to the command to confirm the gate passed."}}'
